fields.summary: Retrieves the current normalized variation coordinates into a provided span.

params.coords: When this method returns, contains the normalized variation coordinate values written to the span. This parameter is treated as uninitialized.

fields.returns: The number of normalized variation coordinates written to <paramref name="coords" />.

fields.summary: Sets the variation coordinates for this font using design-space values.

params.coords: The design-space variation coordinate values to apply.

fields.summary: Sets the variation coordinates for this font using normalized values.

params.coords: The normalized variation coordinate values to apply.

fields.summary: Sets the variation coordinates to match the named instance at the specified index.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance to apply.

fields.summary: Sets font variations using the specified variation settings.

params.variations: The variation axis-value pairs to apply.

fields.summary: Gets an array of the current normalized variation coordinates for this font.
fields.value: An array of normalized variation coordinate values.
